expr: EA +/-J Ising 3x3 periodic, exact 512-config enumeration; F1..F5
expected: F3 MONOTONE + F5 CORR (frustration separates ruggedness)
note: F1 FERRO-2MIN falsified (ferromagnet R=32, not 2) -> frustration amplifies, not creates ruggedness. Kept as honest negative.

expr: N=6 directed graph, 30 morphisms, exact triple enum + boolean transitive closure; F1..F5
args: p in {0.2,0.4,0.6} x 8 seeds (24 instances); F3 density-controlled at p=0.4
expected: F3 CONTROLLED (high-D half out-integrates low-D half at fixed density)
note: F4 CATEGORY-FORM falsified (even p=0.6 gives Dbar=0.576 < 0.85) -> random morphism graphs do not self-organize into closed categories. Kept as honest negative.

expr: N=6 undirected graph, 15 edges, exact b1=E-V+C and chi=V-E, BFS components; F1..F5
args: p in {0.2,0.4,0.6} x 8 seeds (24 instances) + deterministic P6 path; F3 density-controlled at p=0.4
expected: F3 CONTROLLED (high-b1 half out-integrates low-b1 half at fixed density)
note: All 5 pass. F4 EULER-NEG: chi anti-couples with Phi. F5 TREE-EXACT: P6 path gives b1=0 chi=1 exactly.
